The '''V-6d mortar launcher''' was a support weapon manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]].<ref name="BF I guide" /> Used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[TIE pilot]]s and [[Vehicle Command Crewer|Imperial Army pilots]],<ref name="BF I">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref> and [[Imperial commando/Legends|Imperial commandos]] during a number of battlefronts throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="BF II">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> the [[Mortar/Legends|mortar]] launcher was capable of firing volleys of mortars into enemy lines, with a capacity of 5 [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]]. The grenades could be configured to explode on contact or on a timer.<ref name="BF I guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
The V-6d appears in the [[Star Wars Battlefront (series)|''Star Wars: Battlefront'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series as an Imperial-affiliated weapon. The in-game model is shared with several other weapons and is similar in appearance to the [[T-21 light repeating blaster/Legends|T-21 light repeating blaster]].
